title: 封闭式研发 —— 2000 年前的宝洁原型
contentDateLabel: 约 1995 年(Connect & Develop 之前)

description.en: P&G as a self-contained innovation machine — ~7,500 internal scientists across 30 R&D facilities; everything invented in-house, defended by patents, commercialised through P&G channels. Shrinking R&D productivity into the late 1990s set up the C&D pivot.
description.zh: 宝洁作为一个自给自足的创新机器 —— 30 个研发中心、约 7,500 名内部科学家;一切都在内部发明、靠专利保护、通过宝洁自己的渠道商业化。1990 年代后期研发产出率持续下降,为 Connect & Develop 的转向埋下了伏笔。
